embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

before.content:
@everyone

# 🌊 MAJOR ECONOMY UPDATE

We've completely rebalanced the Wave economy to make it fairer, more rewarding, and more fun. Here's everything that changed:

---

**🗺️ LOOT ROUTE POINTS — 4x EARN RATES**
You now earn WAY more for completing routes fast:
⚡ Within 12h → **10 pts** (was 2.5)
⚡ Within 24h → **8 pts** (was 2)
🏃 Within 48h → **4 pts** (was 1)
🚶 Within 3 days → **2 pts** (was 0.5)
💀 Late penalty is now **descending** — -4 day 1, -3 day 2, -2 day 3, then -1/day

---

**💎 WAVE POINTS SHOP — 50% PRICE CUT**
Prizes are now half the price:
🌊 Pro Surge Route → **200 WP**
💰 Pro Loot Route → **400 WP**
🎯 Pro Drop Map → **700 WP**
⭐ Paid Priority → **400 WP**
🌊 Wave Contributor → **450 WP**
👑 VIP → **5,000 WP**

---

**💱 CURRENCY EXCHANGE — REBALANCED**
Loot Route Points are now stronger vs Wave Points.
Baseline rate raised to **1 LRP = 4 WP** (was 1 LRP = 1.67 WP)

---

Check the full leaderboard & shop at 🔗 https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/

embeds.description: Unified Wave staff hub. Staff Sheet archive, Lifetime Activity, Weekly Activity leaderboard, and Wave Economy 2.0 — all in one place.
embeds.title: 🌊 Wave Staff Hub — Cyber-Athletic Performance Tracking

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

before.content:
@everyone

# 🌊 MAJOR STAFF UPDATE

We've completely changed how staffing operates in wave!


**💎 WAVE POINTS SHOP — 50% PRICE CUT**
Prizes are now half the price:
🌊 Pro Surge Route → **200 WP**
💰 Pro Loot Route → **400 WP**
🎯 Pro Drop Map → **700 WP**
⭐ Paid Priority → **400 WP**
🌊 Wave Contributor → **450 WP**
👑 VIP → **5,000 WP**


**🗺️ LOOT ROUTE POINTS — 4x EARN RATES**
You now earn WAY more for completing routes fast:
⚡ Within 12h → **10 pts** (was 2.5)
⚡ Within 24h → **8 pts** (was 2)
🏃 Within 48h → **4 pts** (was 1)
🚶 Within 3 days → **2 pts** (was 0.5)
💀 Late penalty is now **descending** — -4 day 1, -3 day 2, -2 day 3, then -1/day

Also note loot route prizes have gone up as a result 


**💱 CURRENCY EXCHANGE — REBALANCED**
Loot Route Points are now stronger vs Wave Points.
Baseline rate raised to **1 LRP = 4 WP** (was 1 LRP = 1.67 WP)


Check the full leaderboard & shop at 🔗 https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/

embeds.description: Unified Wave staff hub. Staff Sheet archive, Lifetime Activity, Weekly Activity leaderboard, and Wave Economy 2.0 — all in one place.
embeds.title: 🌊 Wave Staff Hub — Cyber-Athletic Performance Tracking

@everyone

# 🌊 MAJOR STAFF UPDATE

We've completely changed how staffing operates in wave!


**💎 WAVE POINTS SHOP — 50% PRICE CUT**
Prizes are now half the price:
🌊 Pro Surge Route → **200 WP**
💰 Pro Loot Route → **400 WP**
🎯 Pro Drop Map → **700 WP**
⭐ Paid Priority → **400 WP**
🌊 Wave Contributor → **450 WP**

**🗺️ LOOT ROUTE POINTS — 4x EARN RATES**
You now earn WAY more for completing routes fast:
⚡ Within 12h → **10 pts** (was 2.5)
⚡ Within 24h → **8 pts** (was 2)
🏃 Within 48h → **4 pts** (was 1)
🚶 Within 3 days → **2 pts** (was 0.5)
💀 Late penalty is now **descending** — -4 day 1, -3 day 2, -2 day 3, then -1/day

Also note loot route prizes have gone up as a result 

**💱 CURRENCY EXCHANGE — REBALANCED**
Loot Route Points are now stronger vs Wave Points.
Baseline rate raised to **1 LRP = 4 WP** (was 1 LRP = 1.67 WP)





Check the full leaderboard & shop at 🔗 https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

embeds.title: 🗺️ Map Request Helper Duty — How It Works

fields.value:
🌟 **Great:** 41+
⭐ **Very Good:** 21 – 40
✅ **Good:** 10 – 20
❌ **Bad:** 9 or below
fields.name: 📊 Performance Ranks (Full Week)

fields.value:
🥇 **1st place:** 300 VBucks
🥈 **2nd place:** 200 VBucks
fields.name: 💰 Weekly VBucks Awards

fields.value:
Get a 🌟 **Great** rank for **3 weeks in a row** to unlock a **1.5× multiplier**!
• Week 1 Great → ✅ Streak started (1/3)
• Week 2 Great → ✅ Streak continues (2/3)
• Week 3 Great → ✅ Streak complete (3/3)
• Week 4 award → 🔥 **1.5× VBucks bonus applied!**
*Streak resets after the multiplier triggers.*
fields.name: 🔥 Activity Streak Bonus

fields.value:
Get a ❌ **Bad** rank? You lose **200 VBucks** from your total balance.
• Drains in order: **main → req → role**
• If your total VBucks is **0** → your duty role is **automatically removed** from all servers
• You'll get a DM telling you what happened
fields.name: ⚠️ Bad Performance Penalty

fields.value:
Both **Away** and **Strike Immunity Away** roles are fully exempt from the Bad penalty.
*If you're away, you won't lose VBucks or your duty role.*
fields.name: 🌴 Away Role Exemption

fields.value:
**At the end of every Full Week** (every 7 days).
*Mid-Week reports are warnings only — no awards or penalties apply.*
fields.name: ⏰ When Are Awards Given?

embeds.description: Welcome to the duty info hub! Here's everything you need to know about how this duty works, how you earn VBucks, and what happens if you slack off this week.

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
